raw_consumer_statement:
A prom dress was ordered online from XXXX. A late shipment was received that did not have the dress and instead had a bikini. I contacted XXXX immediately. They said its XXXX mistake and they will refund the money and I dont need to return anything because I did not receive the item. They did not refund the money so I asked my credit card company ( XXXX XXXXXXXX ) to dispute the charge. My credit card company declined the dispute because they were informed by XXXX that I did not follow the return policy. 
I contacted my credit card company again to dispute it and was declined again. 

I have a copy of my conversation with XXXX. They gave me in writing that they will give a refund. They did not keep their promise. 
I have evidence that I did not get the dress and yet Citibank refused to honor my dispute, even after I explained the situation to them and informed that I have evidence. 
XXXX is a fraud company and Citibank is aiding a fraud company.
